message:
fix(clippy): use Duration::from_mins/from_hours for readability

Replace Duration::from_secs(N) with from_mins/from_hours where N is
an exact multiple of 60 or 3600, satisfying clippy duration_suboptimal_units
on nightly 1.96.0. Affects 14 files across config, http, dns, sync,
supervision, messaging, and observability modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -254,7 +254,7 @@ impl Default for DistributedRegionConfig {
             min_quorum: 2,
             replication_factor: 3,
             init_timeout: Duration::from_secs(30),
-            recovery_timeout: Duration::from_secs(60),
+            recovery_timeout: Duration::from_mins(1),
             allow_degraded: true,
             read_consistency: ConsistencyLevel::One,
             write_consistency: ConsistencyLevel::Quorum,
